name: CT Myelogram Spine
description: CT myelography for detailed evaluation of spinal canal and nerve roots

findings.technique: CT myelography of the spine was performed following intrathecal contrast administration.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: Spinal canal shows [no filling defect / no complete block / no mass]. Contrast flows freely through the subarachnoid space.

sections.name: Nerve Roots
sections.content: Nerve roots [are well opacified / symmetric / no displacement] in the cauda equina.

sections.name: Lateral Recesses
sections.content: Lateral recesses are [patent / no narrowing] at all levels.

sections.name: Neural Foramina
sections.content: Neural foramina [are patent / no stenosis] bilaterally.

impression:
1. Normal CT myelogram.
2. No evidence of spinal stenosis or nerve root compression.
